series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to requests for public records that are processed through the Office of Legal Services that are not covered by PUR-03

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for one year, then destroy. Records sent to the Office of Legal Services specifically in response to a public records request are subject to this schedule, but the record maintained by another office is subject to the applicable retention schedule ; Paper: Retain for one year, then destroy. Records sent to the Office of Legal Services specifically in response to a public records request are subject to this schedule, but the record maintained by another office is subject to the applicable retention schedule, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
